Class SVGColor

java.lang.Object
org.tquadrat.foundation.svg.type.ValueBase
org.tquadrat.foundation.svg.type.SVGPaint
org.tquadrat.foundation.svg.type.SVGColor
@ClassVersion(sourceVersion="$Id: SVGColor.java 1151 2025-10-01 21:32:15Z tquadrat $") @API(status=STABLE, since="0.0.5") public final class SVGColor extends SVGPaint
The implementation for SVG values representing colors.
Author:
Thomas Thrien (thomas.thrien@tquadrat.org)
Version:
$Id: SVGColor.java 1151 2025-10-01 21:32:15Z tquadrat $
Since:
0.0.5

  • Field Details

    • m_Divisor

      private static final int m_Divisor
      This constant is used to force the colour values into the range from 0 to 255.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • COLOR_INHERIT

      public static final SVGColor COLOR_INHERIT
      The type 'inherit'.

  • Constructor Details

    • SVGColor

      private SVGColor()
      Creates a new SVGColor instance with the type "inherit".

    • SVGColor

      public SVGColor(int red, int green, int blue)

      Creates a new SVGColor instance from the given colour values.

      Valid values are in the range from 0 to 255, other values will be normalised accordingly.

      Parameters:
      red - The red component for the colour.
      green - The green component for the colour.
      blue - The blue component for the colour.

    • SVGColor

      public SVGColor(boolean flag, int red, int green, int blue)

      Creates a new SVGColor instance from the given colour values.

      Valid values are in the range from 0 to 255, or from 0% to 100% respectively, other values will be normalised accordingly.

      Parameters:
      flag - true if the given values are percentages, false if they are absolute values.
      red - The red component for the colour.
      green - The green component for the colour.
      blue - The blue component for the colour.

    • SVGColor

      public SVGColor(String color)

      Creates a new SVGColor instance, using the given argument as a CSS colour name.

      The given argument may not be null nor the empty String, but it will not undergo any further validation.

      Parameters:
      color - The CSS colour name.

  • Method Details

    • composeColorValue

      private static final String composeColorValue(boolean flag, int red, int green, int blue)

      Composes the colour type String from the given colour values.

      Valid values are in the range from 0 to 255, or from 0% to 100% respectively, other values will be normalised accordingly.

      Parameters:
      flag - true if the given values are percentages, false if they are absolute values.
      red - The red component for the colour.
      green - The green component for the colour.
      blue - The blue component for the colour.
      Returns:
      The colour type String.

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object obj)
      Overrides:
      equals in class SVGPaint
